overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse through the historic cobblestone streets of Saint Denis. The scene features 19th-century brick architecture with wrought-iron balconies, atmospheric golden hour lighting, and light traffic consisting of horse-drawn carriages and streetcars.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential street with church view

agents.ego_description: riding a horse straight down the cobblestone street toward a large brick church building

entered.detail: large red brick building with arched windows and steep roof visible at the end of the street
row of historic brick townhouses with wrought iron balconies and fenced yards
mature deciduous trees with green foliage lining the left side of the street
wooden telegraph/utility poles with crossbars and wires running along the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a straight view down a cobblestone street lined with trees on the left and historic townhouses on the right. The camera follows a horse rider moving steadily forward toward a prominent brick church building in the distance, with utility poles and wires visible against the golden hour sky.

events.description: rider turns left at the intersection, changing direction from north to west

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing down a wider street with streetcar tracks

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large multi-story brick building with ornate white trim and wraparound balconies
metal streetcar rails embedded in the cobblestone street surface
black horse-drawn carriage with large wheels crossing the intersection

segments.scene_description: The rider executes a left turn at the intersection, revealing a wider street with embedded streetcar tracks. A large ornate brick building with decorative balconies comes into view on the right, while a horse-drawn carriage crosses the intersection ahead. The historic townhouses and trees shift to the left side as the camera reorients.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with covered walkways

events.description: rider passes a stationary horse-drawn carriage parked on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: riding alongside the ornate building, passing parked carriages and observing NPCs on balconies

notable_agents.action: NPC standing on the second-floor balcony of the brick building looking down at the street

entered.detail: wrought iron balconies with decorative railings on the second and third floors of the building
ornate black cast iron street lamp post with glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: The rider proceeds along the narrow street with the large ornate brick building dominating the right side. The camera passes close to the building's wrought-iron balconies where NPCs stand observing the street. A parked carriage is passed on the right, and the street feels more enclosed as the building facade fills the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined commercial street with traffic control

events.description: rider passes under a red octagonal stop sign mounted on a decorative bracket

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street at a steady pace, passing a stop sign and pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: woman in white blouse and red skirt walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign with white lettering mounted on an ornate black metal bracket extending from a pole
two-story red brick building with white trim and large windows on the left side

segments.scene_description: The rider moves past the ornate building and continues down a tree-lined street. A prominent red stop sign is passed on the right, followed by a pedestrian walking on the sidewalk. The street opens up slightly with red brick buildings visible on the left and the tree canopy providing partial shade.

events.description: rider makes a slight right turn to navigate around a staircase protruding onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: making a slight right turn while passing a stone staircase and observing NPCs on an elevated balcony

notable_agents.action: NPC standing on the elevated balcony near the stone stairs looking out over the street

entered.detail: stone steps with concrete railing leading up to a building entrance above street level
black wrought iron railings and balconies on the elevated portion of the building

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the rider navigating a slight right turn past a stone staircase leading to an elevated building entrance. Wrought iron balconies and railings are prominent on the right, with an NPC visible standing above. The street continues into the distance with more historic buildings and utility poles visible under the warm golden hour light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the historic streets of Saint Denis, transitioning from a wide boulevard toward more enclosed, ornate urban corridors under a golden hour sky. It begins with a steady forward glide down a cobblestone street lined with trees and townhouses, heading toward a distant brick church. As the rider executes a left turn at an intersection, the view expands to reveal streetcar tracks and a horse-drawn carriage crossing the path before the scene shifts to a narrower street dominated by a large brick building with decorative wrought-iron balconies. The camera then passes close to these balconies and a parked carriage, moving beyond the ornate facade and past a red stop sign into a tree-shaded area with pedestrians on the sidewalk. Finally, the rider navigates a slight right turn past a stone staircase and elevated railings, continuing deeper into the city among historic buildings and utility poles bathed in warm light.
